title: Opal's Silly Scythes
description: Just like the name states, it adds silly scythes.
body:
This mod adds scythes of three types that can be used for some pretty cool combat mechanics!

---
Spell books can be obtained by trading with villagers, while scythes can be easily crafted!

![Video](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1124374839076061266/1142844176296317038/screenshot.png 'Items')

---

The Iron Scythe has the ability to snatch speed, and has durability. It can be crafted with two sticks and 3 ingots like so:
| Col1             | Col2              | Col3              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
|Iron           | Iron      | [Empty]             |
| [Empty]            | Stick              | Iron             |
| Stick            | [Empty]              | [Empty]             |

---

The diamond scythe's crafting is exactly the same, but with diamonds instead of iron, and can push mobs into the ground.
---
The golden one is made with gold ingots, and summons evoker fangs at the target, while also making you invisible for a couple of seconds
---
[YouTube Video Showcasing the mod!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ThDvC2aDb4)
---
Get Ready For
![Video](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/e3KLeTsC/images/8434ac678800cf85c4d90b3e571b4046d35fdb4b.png 'Items')
